character.name: 苏雨柔
character.appearance: 30岁御姐风，深栗色长发微卷，五官精致带距离感，剪裁利落的黑色西装套装，珍珠耳钉与细高跟，常年保持精致妆容

scenes.narration: 深夜的灯下，只有我与设计稿为伴
scenes.visual_prompt: modern studio with floor-to-ceiling windows, rain streaks on glass, woman in black tailored suit sits at desk, wine glass with red liquid, art prints on walls, soft ambient lighting
scenes.motion: hair sways gently with the breeze

scenes.narration: 这个时间，谁会来打扰我的宁静？
scenes.visual_prompt: woman in high heels stands by elevator door, rainwater drips from her coat, city lights reflected in polished floor, camera focuses on her slightly furrowed brow

scenes.narration: 完美主义的我，从不轻易开门
scenes.visual_prompt: woman in slacks and blouse stands in doorway, light from living room highlights her sharp cheekbones, shadow of figure behind her

scenes.narration: 茶香里藏着无法说出口的孤独
scenes.visual_prompt: woman in apron kneels by stove, steam rises from teapot, warm golden light glows on her face, reflection shows shadowy figure in doorway

scenes.narration: 脚步声让我心跳漏了一拍
scenes.visual_prompt: woman in tailored suit stands in hallway, light from hallway illuminates her profile, shadowy figure approaches from opposite end

scenes.narration: 他身上的雪松香，和我的红酒撞出火花
scenes.visual_prompt: woman in blazer turns slowly, light from window highlights her necklaces, man in dark coat stands in doorway, camera focuses on their mirrored reflections

scenes.narration: 这盏灯下，或许会有新的故事开始
scenes.visual_prompt: woman in heels stands by door, light from hallway creates dramatic shadows, man in dark coat holds a bouquet of white flowers
